name: Dracula's Kung Fu Theatre
overview:
After decades of undead slumber, Dracula's back!

It's 'Elvira' meets "Enter The Dragon" as we join actual, factual, 100% REAL Dracula "LIVE" from his Castle Studio as he shares his immortal collection of "Cult-Classic" VHS Kung Fu films with us!

Armed with his "legendary" comedy skills and joined by a cast of Transylvanian misfits, he's ready to dust off his fangs and deliver A+ jokes to B+ movies. You'll laugh, you'll cry, you might even die, because it's Dracula like you've never seen him before!
